scenarios.name: Baseline normal operation
scenarios.description: Representative hall operates in normal condition with stable power, temperature, and GPU utilization.

scenarios.name: AI workload surge
scenarios.description: Selected racks show higher GPU utilization, increased power draw, and moderate temperature rise.

scenarios.name: Cooling degradation / hotspot condition
scenarios.description: Cooling health degrades in a selected zone, increasing inlet temperature and hotspot risk.

scenarios.name: Workload redistribution
scenarios.description: Load is shifted across selected racks, reducing stress in one area and increasing it in another.
